name: RackStop 1.25
description: Stop fighting your hitch pin.
Meet RackStop — the simple upgrade that eliminates the frustration of aligning your hitch pin.
If you use a 1.25" receiver bike rack, you know the routine: lift the rack, wiggle it, slide it, pull it out, try again… all just to line up the pin hole.
RackStop fixes that.

Install it once on your rack stem, slide the rack into your receiver like normal, set the RackStop against the hitch face, and tighten the bolt. From that point on, your rack stops in the exact position needed for the hitch pin — every time.
No more guessing.
No more sliding the rack back and forth.
Just insert the rack and drop in the pin.
FEATURES
• Eliminates hitch pin alignment frustration
• Install once — perfect alignment every time
• Durable industrial materials
• Handles UV exposure and temperature extremes
• Installs in minutes
HOW IT WORKS
1. Install RackStop on your rack stem
2. Insert your rack into the receiver
3. Slide RackStop against the hitch face
4. Tighten the bolt
Your rack will now stop in the exact position needed for the hitch pin every time you install it.
Built from durable industrial materials designed for outdoor use, RackStop is made to withstand years of use on the road and trail.
Install once. Enjoy effortless hitch pin alignment forever.
Compatible with standard 1.25" receiver hitch racks.
